abbreviations.definition: Repeat instructions between asterisks the number of times specified
Repeat instructions between brackets the number of times specified.
Used to indicate stitches made into the same st/sp

rawInstruction: Ch 1 (doesn't count as a st). (FPdc around the next st from Round 5, skip the first st of the next Petal from Round 6 and hdc in the next 2 sts. [Hdc, ch 2, hdc] in the next ch-2 sp. Hdc in the next 2 sts, skip the last st of the Petal) 12 times. Mark the last ch-2 sp with a SM. Join to the first FPdc with a sl st. Fasten off and work away your ends. {72 hdc, 12 FPdc, and 12 ch-2 sps}
summary: Work front post double crochets and half double crochets to shape petals, then fasten off.
title: Round 7
